name: ten1010-io
description: AI-powered QA automation and Git workflow toolkit for Claude Code.

plugins.name: claude-toolkit
plugins.description: AI-powered QA automation and Git workflow toolkit. /aqa-gen generates YAML test scenarios via Q&A, /aqa-smart auto-generates scenarios from Figma designs, /aqa-run executes scenarios via browser-use with HTML reports, /pr creates pull requests, /merge-check does dry-run merge validation.
